metadata.description: SomeCodecat's multi-agent orchestration setup: route work to Codex and AGY before spending Claude Code's own quota.

plugins.name: multiclaude
plugins.description: Orchestrator + quota: delegate-by-default routing to Codex/AGY, acceptance gates, quota re-routing, a usage readout (/multiclaude:quota), a setup/health check (/multiclaude:setup), and proactive wallet-headroom hooks that bias routing before each dispatch.
